## Type

- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Fix (bug fix)
- [ ] Security (hardening, vulnerability fix)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Test (adding/updating tests)

<!-- List specific files/modules changed and why. -->

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (`npm test` passes)
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if endpoint changes)
- [ ] Manual verification (describe what you tested)
- [ ] No security regressions (path traversal, auth bypass, prompt injection)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, API keys, tokens)
- [ ] Async I/O only (no `readFileSync` in request handlers)
- [ ] RLS policies added for any new database tables
- [ ] PROTECT LIST files not modified without approval
- [ ] `dev_docs/STATUS.md` updated (if task-related)
